name: EU AI Act
description: EU AI Act establishes risk-based obligations for prohibited AI practices, high-risk AI systems, general-purpose AI models, and transparency controls.

categories.name: Risk Classification and Prohibited Practices
categories.description: Implement risk classification and prohibition controls.

requirements.name: Prohibit manipulative and social scoring AI practices
requirements.description: Prohibit manipulative and social scoring AI practices with auditable governance and evidence artifacts.
requirements.verification: Review implementation evidence for prohibit manipulative and social scoring ai practices

applicability.subject: AI providers, deployers, importers, and distributors

requirements.name: Classify high-risk AI systems
requirements.description: Classify high-risk AI systems with auditable governance and evidence artifacts.
requirements.verification: Review implementation evidence for classify high-risk ai systems

applicability.subject: AI providers, deployers, importers, and distributors

requirements.name: Maintain risk management system for high-risk AI
requirements.description: Maintain risk management system for high-risk AI with auditable governance and evidence artifacts.
requirements.verification: Review implementation evidence for maintain risk management system for high-risk ai

applicability.subject: AI providers, deployers, importers, and distributors

requirements.verification: Review implementation evidence for govern training, validation, and test datasets

applicability.subject: AI providers, deployers, importers, and distributors

categories.name: High-Risk AI Controls
categories.description: Apply lifecycle controls for high-risk AI systems.

requirements.verification: Review implementation evidence for maintain technical documentation and logs

subcategories.description: Run conformity assessment and ongoing monitoring.

requirements.verification: Review implementation evidence for implement human oversight controls

categories.name: GPAI and Transparency Duties
categories.description: Implement obligations for GPAI models and transparency disclosures.
